nasb.text: But truly we have done this out of concern, for a reason, saying, ‘In time to come your sons may say to our sons, “What have you to do with the Lord, the God of Israel?

esv.text: No, but we did it from fear that in time to come your children might say to our children, ‘What have you to do with the Lord, the God of Israel?

cnv.text: 我們作這事，實在是有理由的，因為顧慮將來你們的子孫對我們的子孫說：‘你們與耶和華以色列的　神有甚麼關係呢？

ccb.text: 我们这样做是怕以后你们的子孙可能会对我们的子孙说，‘你们和以色列的上帝耶和华有什么关系？
